name: Apple-Nut Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat griddle to 350°F (180°C) or medium high.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients until the batter is almost smooth.
3. Heat lightly greased griddle and pour in pancake batter.
4. Cook until nicely browned, turning once.
5. Yield: 10-12 pancakes.
